title: The Agents Receive Their Orders
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the agents receive their orders, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Agents Receive Their Orders. The Straw Hats struggle across Alabasta’s harsh desert as Vivi’s urgency and the scale of the rebellion become clearer. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ughh...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Can you please stop panting like that, Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just hearing it is tiring me out...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ughh... I'm roasting up...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: CAN'T EVEN... SWEAT ANYMORE...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm done for... I'm fine with the gold but the heat's no good...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's because you're so fluffy.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Maybe you oughta take off your fur coat?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You makin' fun of me just 'cause I'm a Reindeer!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: GyaAA! MOOON- STEER!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Chopper! I'm not gonna pull you if you turn big!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...You seem to be holding' up pretty well, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well, I was born and raised in this country.

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Man, what is up with all these hills?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: It's like I'm hiking up a mountain here...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This is a very old desert.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Some of the larger sand dunes here reach over 300 meters.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: T-three hundred!!? I thought this was a desert, not a mountain range...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Water...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Pull

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Remember, Luffy. One gulp. just enough to moisten your throat.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: right...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's why too much!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: give ME some water! you just had like, 13 gulps!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: No, you had your turn before him! It's my turn to drink next!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: pffft!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What the hell was that for! I spat out the water 'cause of you so it doesn't count!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Please stop fighting! You'll only tires your- selves out even more!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Doesn't count, my ass!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey Samji, let's open up that special "Pirate Lunchbox" now!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: No. Not until Vivi says ok.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Vivi, let's have lunch already. I don't have any strength...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm sorry Luffy, but we're only a quarter of the way to Yuba right now.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well that's a pretty stupid reason. Haven't you ever heard of the proverb,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: "Eat when the stomach growls."

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey, don't just make up stuff now.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Alright, how does a break at the next rock we walk by sound?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Woohoo! To a rock we go!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Rock? Where are you, rock...?

summary: This part develops the agents receive their orders and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
